title: Kiki
writer: Hanns Kräly, George Marion Jr., André Picard
actors: Norma Talmadge, Ronald Colman, Gertrude Astor
plot: Kiki, a poor young woman who sells newspapers on the street corners of Paris, is able to land a job singing and dancing at a nearby theater. While she is there, she invites herself into the life of the revue's manager, with whom s...
